name: HRM_PLAN_OWNERS
description: The owners table provides information about the plan owners.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning.

columns.Name: ENABLE_ALERT
columns.Comments: Enable Alert determines whether alert/notification has to be sent to the particular owner or not.

columns.Name: PLAN_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: Plan owner id uniquely identifies the owner in the plan.

columns.Name: PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Plan id indicated the plan in which current owner belongs to.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person id represents the person id of the plan owner.

columns.Name: OWNER_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Owner Type Code determines whether user has Administrator or Viewer or Candidate Manager access.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LATEST_RECORD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Latest record flag indicates the latest-active snapshot.

columns.Name: OPERATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Operation type represents the type of operation committed.

columns.Name: SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Source code represents the source from were row is created or updated.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date from represent the date from which current snapshot has created.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date to represents end date for the current snapshot.

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY
columns.Comments: Source Key represents the object_id of source from where row is created or updated.
